name: better-agent-terminal
description: Windows terminal aggregator with multi-workspace support and Claude Code integration
author: TonyQ CO., LTD.

scripts.verify:tauri-pre-ci: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false && pnpm run compile && pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:ci && pnpm run check:tauri-rust && pnpm run test:sidecar && pnpm run test:host-api && pnpm run test:host-direct-calls && pnpm run test:host-claude-coverage && pnpm run test:codex && pnpm run test:input-history-navigation && pnpm run test:pty-input-writer && pnpm run test:workspace-move-drag && pnpm run test:openai-cleanup && pnpm run test:claude-message-guards && pnpm run test:chat-markdown && pnpm run test:agent-task-tree && pnpm run test:workspace-restore && pnpm run test:renderer-logging && pnpm run test:tauri-bundle-prune && pnpm run test:tauri-resources && pnpm run test:release-asset-names && pnpm run test:update-manifest && pnpm run test:tauri-capabilities && pnpm run test:tauri-version-sync && pnpm run test:runtime-catalog-sync && pnpm run test:tauri-windows-installer && pnpm run test:tauri-codex-runtime && pnpm run test:tauri-sidecar-minimal-modules && pnpm run test:build-version-script && pnpm run test:rust-base-cache-key && pnpm run test:tauri-resource-cache-keys && pnpm run test:tauri-preview-readiness && pnpm run verify:tauri-resources:all-in-one && pnpm run verify:tauri-preview-readiness:all-in-one && pnpm run verify:tauri-resources:lightweight && pnpm run verify:tauri-preview-readiness:lightweight
scripts.verify:tauri-release-ci: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:ci:all-in-one && pnpm run verify:tauri-resources:all-in-one && pnpm run verify:tauri-preview-readiness:all-in-one && pnpm run verify:tauri-resources:lightweight && pnpm run verify:tauri-preview-readiness:lightweight
scripts.verify:tauri-preview: pnpm run verify:tauri-pre-ci && pnpm run test:tauri-launch
scripts.test:codex: pnpm run test:codex-panel && pnpm run test:codex-auto-continue
scripts.test:sidecar: node node-sidecar/tests/server.test.mjs && node node-sidecar/tests/claude-channel-runtime.test.mjs && node node-sidecar/tests/claude-cli.test.mjs && node node-sidecar/tests/claude-cli-runtime.test.mjs
scripts.prepare:tauri-bundle:all-in-one: node scripts/fetch-node-runtime.mjs && pnpm --dir node-sidecar install && pnpm run prune:tauri-sidecar && pnpm run build:tauri-sidecar && pnpm run prepare:tauri-sidecar-node-modules && pnpm run prepare:tauri-codex-runtime
scripts.prepare:tauri-bundle:lightweight: pnpm --dir node-sidecar install && pnpm run build:tauri-sidecar
scripts.prepare:tauri-bundle:ci:all-in-one: node scripts/fetch-node-runtime.mjs && pnpm run sync:runtime-catalog && pnpm --dir node-sidecar install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline && pnpm run prune:tauri-sidecar && pnpm run build:tauri-sidecar && pnpm run prepare:tauri-sidecar-node-modules && pnpm run prepare:tauri-codex-runtime
scripts.prepare:tauri-bundle:ci:lightweight: pnpm run sync:runtime-catalog && pnpm --dir node-sidecar install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline && pnpm run build:tauri-sidecar
scripts.tauri:build:ci:all-in-one: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:ci:all-in-one && node scripts/tauri-build-mode.mjs --mode all-in-one
scripts.tauri:build:ci:lightweight: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:ci:lightweight && node scripts/tauri-build-mode.mjs --mode lightweight
scripts.tauri:build:all-in-one: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:all-in-one && node scripts/tauri-build-mode.mjs --mode all-in-one
scripts.tauri:build:lightweight: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:lightweight && node scripts/tauri-build-mode.mjs --mode lightweight
scripts.tauri:build:debug:ci:all-in-one: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:ci:all-in-one && node scripts/tauri-build-mode.mjs --mode all-in-one --debug
scripts.tauri:build:debug:ci:lightweight: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:ci:lightweight && node scripts/tauri-build-mode.mjs --mode lightweight --debug
scripts.tauri:build:debug:all-in-one: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:all-in-one && node scripts/tauri-build-mode.mjs --mode all-in-one --debug
scripts.tauri:build:debug:lightweight: pnpm run prepare:tauri-bundle:lightweight && node scripts/tauri-build-mode.mjs --mode lightweight --debug
